about.title: Designed for smarter support
about.description: A modern customer support platform powered by AI, built to help teams communicate, respond, and scale conversations smoothly. Enables companies to create a customizable intelligent chat agent, delivering consistent experiences across channels with full security and compliance control.
about.description2: Our mission is to streamline customer communication and reduce response times, empowering teams worldwide with smart, customizable, and reliable chat systems designed for growth.
about.page_description_line1: safira is an ai-powered customer support platform designed to help modern businesses deliver
about.page_description_line2: faster, smarter, and more secure customer interactions.
about.who_we_are_body1: We believe AI should do more than answer questions. It should empower teams, reduce operational load, and scale customer support without compromising quality or control. That’s why Safira combines intelligent AI chat agents with enterprise-grade security, flexible workflows, and seamless integrations — all in one platform.
about.who_we_are_body2: Safira is built to support growing teams and large organizations, especially in regulated and high-trust environments such as financial services, insurance, and enterprise operations.
about.mission_body: To enable businesses to deliver intelligent, reliable customer support by combining the speed of AI with the oversight, security, and professionalism required by modern enterprises.
about.production_body1: Safira is developed by FIS – Future Information Systems, a technology company with long-standing experience in building FinTech, InsurTech, and enterprise systems deployed in real, mission-critical environments.
about.production_body2: Our background in regulated industries shapes how Safira is designed with reliability, governance, and long-term scalability at its core.
about.why_choose_subtitle: As businesses scale, customer communication becomes more complex across multiple channels and growing customer bases. Safira exists to

plans2.title: Choose the right plan for your business

basic.label: Basic
basic.desc: Designed for small teams taking their first steps with integrated basic options.

standard.label: Standard
standard.desc: Designed for teams that need better customization and ready integrations.

pro.label: Professional
pro.desc: Most powerful features with high performance and advanced analytics.

enterprise.label: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: Flexible solutions for enterprises with advanced security and private or cloud deployment.

comparison_notes: All prices exclude VAT and do not include setup, customization, or system integration.
Setup and integration are priced separately based on the scope of work.
All plans are subject to a Fair Usage Policy. Upgrades between plans are available at any time.
Discounts are available for annual payments.
plans2.closing_text:
SAFIRA represents a practical step towards smart digital transformation, enabling organizations to deliver
better services at a lower cost and with greater efficiency.

aiSupport.title: AI-Powered Customer Support
aiSupport.description:
Artificial Intelligence is reshaping how organizations interact with their
customers by enabling instant responses, automating repetitive processes, and
providing consistent and accurate information across multiple communication
channels. Instead of relying solely on human agents, AI-powered support
systems can operate 24/7, reduce waiting times, and ensure a unified customer
experience.

vision.page_description: Shaping the future of customer support through intelligent automation.
vision.section1_body: We envision a world where every business, regardless of size, has access to world-class customer support powered by AI. Our mission is to democratize intelligent customer service by providing tools that are easy to use, secure, and built for growth.
vision.section2_body: We're committed to continuous innovation in AI, security, and user experience. Our team works tirelessly to develop solutions that help businesses scale their support operations without sacrificing quality or security.
vision.section3_body: By partnering with leading enterprises and innovative startups, we're transforming how companies interact with their customers. Our platform processes millions of conversations daily, helping businesses reduce response times and improve customer satisfaction.
vision.cta_title: Join us in transforming customer support.
vision.cta_subtitle: Experience the future of AI-powered customer interaction today.
